long_description:
This is the extended window needed to complete decommission of clusters that were not completed in CHG14179732
Reduce host count on workload compute clusters in DAL MT workload
4 hosts in dal10-w082-work03-c02
3 hosts in dal12-w082-work01-c02
2 hosts in dal13-w082-work04-c01
short_description: Complete decommissions of hosts in DAL
